name: AnalysisMaterial
summary: The AnalysisMaterial class contains the material information.

constructors.name: AnalysisMaterial
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the AnalysisMaterial class.

methods.name: Select
methods.summary: Selects an analysis material. The AnalysisModelName and Name have to be set.

properties.name: AnalysisModelName
properties.summary: Gets or sets the analysis model name.

properties.name: AnalysisObjectType
properties.summary: Gets or sets the type of the analysis object.

properties.name: DampingFactor
properties.summary: Gets or sets the damping factor of the material.

properties.name: Density
properties.summary: Gets or sets the density of the material.

properties.name: FatherObject2ID
properties.summary: Gets or sets the identifier of the father part.

properties.name: FatherObject2Type
properties.summary: Gets or sets the type of the father object.

properties.name: FatherObjectID
properties.summary: Gets or sets the identifier of the father part.

properties.name: FatherObjectType
properties.summary: Gets or sets the type of the father object.

properties.name: ID
properties.summary: Gets or sets the identifier of the analysis object.

properties.name: MaterialType
properties.summary: Gets or sets tThe type of the material.

properties.name: ModulusOfElasticity
properties.summary: Gets or sets the modulus of elasticity of the analysis material.

properties.name: Name
properties.summary: Gets or sets the name of the analysis material.

properties.name: PoissonsRatio
properties.summary: Gets or sets the Poisson's ratio of the analysis material.

properties.name: ThermalDilatation
properties.summary: Gets or sets the thermal dilatation of the analysis material.
